name: retrieval_holdout_v1
purpose: One-time held-out evaluation of local retrieval generalization.

construction.source: Human-curated queries written separately from researchbench.jsonl.
construction.labels: One to five manually assigned source ids from the frozen 23-document corpus.

protocol.no_tuning_rule: Do not change retrieval weights, query expansion, corpus text, or labels based on this set.
protocol.reporting_rule: Report all modes, all 80 cases, failures, language/style/hop breakdowns, and file hashes.
protocol.ci_policy: Do not run this holdout in CI. CI continues to use the development regression set.

limitations: This is a project-scale held-out set, not an independent third-party benchmark.
Queries and labels become public after repository publication, so v1 must not be reused to tune v2.
The corpus is small and project-specific; metrics do not imply production search accuracy.
